readFile() - Method in class FXMainPane
 
removeEdge(Town, Town, int, String) - Method in class Graph
 
removeEdge(V, V, int, String) - Method in interface GraphInterface
Removes an edge going from source vertex to target vertex, if such vertices and such edge exist in this graph.
removeVertex(Town) - Method in class Graph
 
removeVertex(V) - Method in interface GraphInterface
Removes the specified vertex from this graph including all its touching edges if present.
Road - Class in Unnamed Package
This class represents a road through the 2 towns it connects, its distance/weight, and its name.
Road(Town, Town, int, String) - Constructor for class Road
constructor for a weighted edge
Road(Town, Town, String) - Constructor for class Road
default constructor that sets up an unweighted edge
